::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeTableIntroductions"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_tbl-intro-abr-infection.qmd")
```
:::

```{r}
#| label: tbl-abr-infection-rate
#| tbl-cap: !expr 'sR$`tbl-abr-infection-rate`$`tbl-cap`'
#| tbl-cap-location: top

check_outlier_interpretation <- FALSE

# Conditionally render table only if department data exists
if (!is.null(benchmark_data$abr_infection_rate_table) &&
    sum(benchmark_data$abr_infection_rate_table$n_own, na.rm = TRUE) > 0) {

  # Check if reference data columns exist
  has_reference <- "pooled_ref" %in% names(benchmark_data$abr_infection_rate_table)
  check_outlier_interpretation <- has_reference
  
  tbl <- benchmark_data$abr_infection_rate_table |>
    dplyr::select(-tidyselect::any_of("n_ref")) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      group = dplyr::if_else(
        stringr::str_detect(group, "spp."),
        paste0("*", stringr::str_extract(group, "^(.+) spp\\.(.*)$", 1), "* spp.", stringr::str_extract(group, "^(.+) spp\\.(.*)$", 2)),
        group
      )) |>
    dplyr::rename(
      !!sR$table_headers$n := "n_own",
      !!sR$table_headers$rate := "pooled_own",
      !!sR$table_headers$pooled := tidyselect::any_of("pooled_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q1 := tidyselect::any_of("q1_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q2 := tidyselect::any_of("q2_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q3 := tidyselect::any_of("q3_ref")) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      abr = dplyr::case_match(
        .data$abr,
        "3gcr" ~ "3gcr",
        "car" ~ sR$car,
        "cor" ~ sR$cor,
        "mrsa" ~ sR$mrsa,
        "vre" ~ sR$vre),
      level = .data$level + 2) |>
    dplyr::group_by(.data$abr) |>
    gt(rowname_col = "group") |>
    sub_missing() |>
    gt::tab_options(
      latex.header_repeat = TRUE,
      latex.use_longtable = TRUE,
      table.width = pct(100),
      table.font.size = 13,
      footnotes.marks = "extended"
    ) |>
    gt::tab_options(
      table.font.size = 15
    ) |>
    fmt_number(
      columns = c(
        tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$rate),
        tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$pooled),
        tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$q1),
        tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$q2),
        tidyselect::any_of(sR$table_headers$q3)),
      decimals = 1,
      sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
      min_sep_threshold = 2,
      locale = locale_gt) |>
    fmt_integer(
      columns = sR$table_headers$n,
      sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
      min_sep_threshold = 2) |>
    gt::fmt_markdown(
      columns = "group"
    ) |>
    gt::tab_stub_indent(
      rows = gt::everything(),
      indent = gt::from_column(column = "level")
    ) |>
    tab_row_group(
      label = gt::md(sR$`3gcr`),
      rows = abr == "3gcr"
    ) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(
        weight = "bold"
      ),
      locations = cells_row_groups()
    ) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(
        weight = "bold"
      ),
      locations = cells_stub(
        rows = taxon %in% c(
          "none",
          "domain",
          "kingdom",
          "order",
          "genus",
          "coag_type")
      )
    ) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(
        style = "italic"
      ),
      locations = cells_stub(
        rows = taxon %in% c(
          "domain",
          "kingdom",
          "order",
          "species")
      )
    ) |>
    cols_hide(columns = any_of(c("level","taxon"))) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      locations = list(
        cells_column_spanners(),
        cells_column_labels(),
        cells_row_groups()
      )
    ) |>
      tab_spanner(
        label = sR$`tbl-abr-infection-rate`$`rate_name`,
        columns = tidyselect::any_of(
          c(
            sR$table_headers$rate,
            sR$table_headers$pooled,
            sR$table_headers$q1,
            sR$table_headers$q2,
            sR$table_headers$q3)),
        id = "resistant_pathogen_infection_rate",
        level = 2
      ) |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = md(
        paste0(
          "$$\\text{",
          sR$`tbl-abr-infection-rate`$`rate_name`,
          "} = \\frac{\\text{",
          sR$`tbl-abr-infection-rate`$`rate_numerator`,
          "}}{\\text{",
          sR$`tbl-abr-infection-rate`$`rate_denominator`,
          "}} \\times ",
          format_integer(100),
          "$$"
        )),
      locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "resistant_pathogen_infection_rate")
    ) |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = sprintf(
        sR$`tbl-abr-infection-rate`$n_footnote,
        sR$table_headers$n),
      locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$n)
    ) |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = sprintf(
        sR$`tbl-abr-infection-rate`$rate_footnote,
        sR$table_headers$rate),
      locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$rate)
    )
  
  if (has_reference) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      cols_width(
        stub() ~ pct(40),
        sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(12),
        sR$table_headers$rate ~ pct(12),
        sR$table_headers$pooled ~ pct(13),
        sR$table_headers$q1 ~ pct(8),
        sR$table_headers$q2 ~ pct(8),
        sR$table_headers$q3 ~ pct(7)
      ) |>
      tab_spanner(
        label = sR$department_data,
        columns = c(
          sR$table_headers$n,
          sR$table_headers$rate),
        id = "department_data"
      ) |>
      tab_spanner(
        label = sR$reference_data,
        columns = c(
          sR$table_headers$pooled,
          sR$table_headers$q1,
          sR$table_headers$q2,
          sR$table_headers$q3),
        id = "reference_data"
      ) |>
      tab_footnote(
        footnote = sprintf(
          sR$`tbl-abr-infection-rate`$pooled_footnote,
          sR$table_headers$pooled),
        locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$pooled)) |>
      tab_footnote(
        footnote = sprintf(
          sR$`tbl-abr-infection-rate`$quartile_footnote,
          sR$table_headers$q1,
          sR$table_headers$q2,
          sR$table_headers$q3,
          sprintf("%i%s", 25L, sR$percent_symbol),
          sprintf("%i%s", 50L, sR$percent_symbol),
          sprintf("%i%s", 75L, sR$percent_symbol)
        ),
        locations = cells_column_labels(columns = c(
          sR$table_headers$q1,
          sR$table_headers$q2,
          sR$table_headers$q3)))
  } else {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      cols_width(
        stub() ~ pct(60),
        sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(20),
        sR$table_headers$rate ~ pct(20)
      )
  }
  
  tbl
} else {
  cat(sR$`tbl-abr-infection-rate`$no_data)
}

```

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeOutlierInterpretation"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
if (check_outlier_interpretation) {
  outliers <- detect_outliers(benchmark_data$abr_infection_rate_table, combine_cols = c("abr", "group"))
  if (length(outliers$below_q1) > 0 || length(outliers$above_q3) > 0) {
    grouped <- group_outliers(outliers, "abr_infection")
    outlier_text <- format_outlier_text(grouped, sR)
    if (nchar(outlier_text) > 0) {
      cat("\n\n::: {.callout-note}\n")
      cat("## ", sR$outlier$heading, "\n\n")
      cat(outlier_text, "\n")
      cat(":::\n")
    }
  }
}
```

:::
